title: YouTube Indicator Video Uj7Bk7r9dfU
thesis_bullets: It gives you impulse signal where the momentum is suddenly increasing and a breakout is probably going to happen.
This is one of the best indicators on trading view for scalping strategies and day trading strategies.
So it's suitable for time frames like 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes up to 1 hour.

This indicator can be used for any type of trading strategies whether it is trend following strategy, reversal strategy or breakout trading strategy because it gives you a signal when there is a sudden increase of momentum in the market.
I will completely explain this indicator and how you can use it in trading.
All right, on Trading View platform here, we click on indicators and we search BB impulse indicator.
This one which is written by Lazy Bayer.
All right, this is the indicator and as you can see it is added here below the chart.
As you can see, we have a histogram and the bars are sometimes above the center line and sometimes below the center line with different colors.
As you can see, this indicator is built based on Ballinger bands and it is created by John Ballinger who's the one created the Ballinger bands.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when BB Impulse bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on 1h bar close.
Use longer MACD side of zero as trend direction gate before entries.
Trigger entries when shorter MACD aligns with longer MACD direction.
Gate entries when BB Impulse stays above control threshold to avoid weak-pressure chop.
Derived idea: use ATR-based stop/TP envelope for deterministic testability of swing-style stops.
